hero.title: Systematize Your Consignment Business.
hero.desc: Record stock, monitor paid/debt bills, and calculate profit per shop in one concise and headache-free screen.

features.desc: Core modules designed as concisely as possible so that data input can be done quickly from a mobile phone while you are in the field.

0.title: Product Data & Shop Mapping
0.desc: Manage product lists with stock details, and monitor which shops the items are distributed to in a centralized database.

1.title: Accounts Receivable & Profit Calculation
1.desc: Automatically mark shops with debt or paid status. The system will immediately recap your net profit margin for that period.

2.title: Automatic Restock Scheduling
2.desc: No more missed shops. Set the last delivery date and the system will remind you of the expired item withdrawal or restock schedule.

guide.title: 3 Easy Steps to Start
guide.desc: It doesn't take long to move your manual notes. We made the process as simple as possible.

0.title: 1. Register Shop Points
0.desc: Enter shop name and location. You only need to do this once at the beginning of the cooperation.

1.title: 2. Input Consigned Items
1.desc: Select products, enter the amount consigned, and determine the base price and selling price.

2.title: 3. Monitor & Withdraw Profit
2.desc: When the restock schedule arrives, update the remaining items. The system automatically calculates the money to be collected.

roadmap.title: Large Scale Preparation
roadmap.desc: We are preparing these features so that the application is not just a notebook, but also your proactive business assistant.

0.title: Data Analytics & Advanced Search
0.desc: Visualize best performing shop trend metrics and search history data using specific filter combinations.

1.title: WhatsApp Automation & Excel Export
1.desc: Send bill details to shop owners via WA with one click, and download the data recapitulation in XLSX format for external bookkeeping.

modal.title: All Version Notes
modal.footer: You are viewing history up to version v1.0.0

cta.title: Leave the Manual Way.
cta.desc: Start taking full control of your goods distribution now. Free registration and ready to use immediately.

auth.registerDesc: Start systematizing your consignment business today.
